news_bbc.title: Energy bills to rise for millions as impact of Iran war hits
news_bbc.summary: A household using a typical amount of energy will pay £221 a year more, under the regulator's new price cap.

news_bbc.title: 'Bullying' and 'overbearing' behaviour behind abrupt BP chairman removal
news_bbc.summary: BP declined to comment on whether bullying behaviour was part of the reason for his immediate dismissal.

news_bbc.title: Booming AI chip demand helps create two new $1tn club members
news_bbc.summary: SK Hynix and Micron are the latest tech firms to join the growing list of stocks with mega valuations.

news_bbc.title: Ferrari shares slump after it unveils first fully electric car
news_bbc.summary: The new Luce model has divided opinion on social media, and comes despite intense pressure from Chinese EV makers.

news_bbc.title: Post Office investigation could be delayed by five years, police warn
news_bbc.summary: The commander leading the national police inquiry says the size of the investigation team would need to double in order to meet its current timeline

news_bbc.title: Farmers' warning as milk prices fall below cost
news_bbc.summary: Farmers worry more family farms will be sold unless dairy prices rise quickly.

news_bbc.title: Champion ethical hacker warns AI tools like Mythos will make competing harder
news_bbc.summary: Chompie, one of the world's tops ethical hackers, says AI like Claude Mythos will make it harder for people like her to compete.

news_bbc.title: Instagram betting ads featuring Kane and Haaland banned
news_bbc.summary: The advertising watchdog said the adverts featuring top footballers had a strong appeal to under-18s.
